exercises.audioScript: He scored a goal and won the match.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The team performed well.
There was complete silence at night.
Cricket is the most popular sport in India.
He scored a goal and won the match.
exercises.answer: He scored a goal and won the match.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The match is tomorrow evening.
An echo was heard in the mountains.
The football team won the match.
This sound is very loud.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The ball went out of the boundary.
I like listening to music.
Hockey is our national game.
His voice is very soft.

exercises.audioScript: There is a lot of noise in the factory.
exercises.hindiScript: फैक्ट्री में बहुत शोर होता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: He scored a goal and won the match.
Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
I like playing badminton.
There is a lot of noise in the factory.
exercises.answer: There is a lot of noise in the factory.

exercises.audioScript: There was complete silence at night.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This sound is very loud.
Dividing twenty by five gives four.
He got first place in the race.
There was complete silence at night.
exercises.answer: There was complete silence at night.

exercises.audioScript: An echo was heard in the mountains.

options: His voice is very soft.

An echo was heard in the mountains.
exercises.answer: An echo was heard in the mountains.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: There is a lot of noise in the factory.

exercises.audioScript: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.
exercises.hindiScript: तीन को पाँच से गुणा करने पर पंद्रह होता है।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: There was complete silence at night.
Cricket is the most popular sport in India.

exercises.answer: Multiplying three by five gives fifteen.

dictationPassage.text: He scored a goal and won the match. This sound is very loud. His voice is very soft. There is a lot of noise in the factory. There was complete silence at night.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: उसने गोल करके जीत दिलाई। यह आवाज़ बहुत तेज़ है। उसकी आवाज़ बहुत धीमी है। फैक्ट्री में बहुत शोर होता है। रात को पूरी शांति थी।
